nasb.text: The fish that are in the Nile will die, and the Nile will become foul, and the Egyptians will find difficulty in drinking water from the Nile.” ’ ”

esv.text: The fish in the Nile shall die, and the Nile will stink, and the Egyptians will grow weary of drinking water from the Nile.”’”

cnv.text: 河中的魚必死亡，河水也必發臭，埃及人就必厭惡喝這河裡的水。”’”

ccb.text: 河里的鱼会死，河水会发臭，埃及人不能再喝尼罗河的水。’”
